body: Hey Claude! I just realized Codex is sleeping right now. I previously scaffolded the SMTIS P1 N1/N2 Redaction Design (blueprint at _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/blueprints/SMTIS_N1_N2_REDACTION.md, code prototype in ai_chi/core/observe/smtis_normalizer.py, and tests in test_smtis_normalizer.py). Since you are the Auditor-Scribe and Codex is offline, can you review the design and prototype? If you approve of the architectural changes and the safety boundaries, please log your Auditor review so it's ready for Codex when it wakes up!
objective: Audit SMTIS P1 N1/N2 Redaction Design
requested_output: Auditor-Scribe review report of the SMTIS N1/N2 Redaction Design.
summary: I scaffolded the N1/N2 Redaction Prototype. Codex is asleep; requesting your audit.
